summary: Product Recommendations Engine testing complete. All backend API tests (13/13) and frontend UI tests passed. Recommendations endpoint returns tiered results with _rec_reason field. Featured products endpoint returns 8 diverse products with images. Product detail pages display 'You May Also Like' and 'Explore Other Brands' sections correctly. Homepage shows Featured Products with all required elements.

tests: GET /api/catalog/recommendations/michi-x5-s2?limit=8 returns 8 recommendations with _rec_reason - PASS
Recommendations prioritize same series first (tier 1) - PASS
GET /api/catalog/recommendations/ku44-i?limit=8 returns cross-brand recs - PASS
Recommendation reasons follow tiered priority - PASS
GET /api/catalog/recommendations/non-existent returns 404 - PASS
Recommendations excludes self product - PASS
GET /api/catalog/featured?limit=8 returns exactly 8 products - PASS
Featured products all have images - PASS
Featured products have required fields (id, slug, name, brand, category, image) - PASS
Featured products are diverse (8 different brands) - PASS
Featured limit parameter works correctly - PASS
Recommendation products have valid slugs for linking - PASS
Featured product slugs linkable to detail pages - PASS
/products/michi-x5-s2 detail page shows 'You May Also Like' section - PASS
Related products have correct data-testid attributes - PASS
Related product cards link to /products/{slug} - PASS
Michi X5 S2 page correctly shows NO 'Explore Other Brands' (all recs are Rotel) - PASS
/products/ku44-i detail page shows BOTH 'You May Also Like' AND 'Explore Other Brands' - PASS
K-Array ku44-i cross-category recs link correctly - PASS
Homepage has Featured Products section with data-testid='featured-products-section' - PASS
Homepage shows 'Curated Selection' label - PASS
Homepage shows 'Featured Products' heading - PASS
Homepage shows 'View All Products' link to /products - PASS
Homepage Featured Products grid shows 8 product cards - PASS
Featured product cards show images, category badges, brand names, product names - PASS
Featured product cards link to /products/{slug} detail pages - PASS

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing catalog products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product recommendations engine fully functional. Backend endpoints: GET /api/catalog/recommendations/{slug} (tiered content-based recs with _rec_reason), GET /api/catalog/featured (8 curated products). Frontend: Product detail pages split recs into sameBrand ('You May Also Like') and crossCat ('Explore Other Brands'). Homepage FeaturedProducts component between TrustedInUAE and Testimonials. data-testids: featured-products-section, featured-products-grid, featured-product-{i}, related-products-title, cross-category-title, related-product-{i}, cross-rec-{i}.

GET /api/catalog/featured?limit=8 returns exactly 8 products all with images
Recommendations prioritize same series first, then same brand+category, then same category
/products/michi-x5-s2 detail page shows 'You May Also Like' section with recommended products
/products/ku44-i detail page shows both 'You May Also Like' AND 'Explore Other Brands' sections
Recommendation product cards link to /products/{slug} detail pages
Homepage shows 'Featured Products' section with 8 product cards
Homepage Featured Products section has 'Curated Selection' label, 'Featured Products' heading, 'View All Products' link
